scripts.dev: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh js-script scripts/voicevox.mjs start && concurrently -k "sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh server-dev" "sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh vite --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.dev:server: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh server-dev
scripts.dev:bun: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && bun scripts/voicevox.mjs start && concurrently -k "sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh server-dev" "bunx vite --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.build: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh vite build && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && cp server/*.py dist/server/
scripts.build:client: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh vite build
scripts.build:server: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && cp server/*.py dist/server/
scripts.build:bun: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && bunx vite build && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && cp server/*.py dist/server/
scripts.start: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && NODE_ENV=production sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh server-start dist/server/index.js
scripts.start:bun: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && NODE_ENV=production sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh server-start dist/server/index.js
scripts.typecheck: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && sh scripts/runtime-entry.sh tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck:bun: sh scripts/ensure-supported-install.sh && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit
